candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; appears as the reported sales/revenue line.
Revenue-related wording, but clearly not the main top-line and should not be used when total revenue exists.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the direct top-line revenue label. Duplicate appearance in preview does not justify repeating the label in final_choice.

candidates.why: Inventory balance sheet item, not an income statement cost-of-sales expense.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. No clear income statement row for cost of goods sold/cost of sales/direct production costs is presented. 'Operating expenses' is too broad and includes non-COGS items, so left unmapped.

candidates.why: Direct SG&A/overhead component and the clearest explicit administrative expense line.
Broad operating expense bucket that may include non-SG&A or production-related costs; less preferred than explicit G&A.
Good SG&A-type component in principle, but this exact candidate label does not appear populated as the main reported row; the actual row present is 'Share based payments'.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Operational statistic, not expense.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A-type row exists and is populated, so per hierarchy selected only 'General and administrative costs'. Did not add 'Operating expenses' because it is broader and may include non-SG&A items. Did not add 'Share based payments' because the hierarchy prefers the explicit SG&A row alone when available.

candidates.why: Balance sheet asset/capitalized development item, not a dedicated R&D expense line.

variables.notes: No dedicated research and development expense line is visible on the income statement.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense line; best match for financing cost.
Recurring finance-cost line and suitable add-on to interest expense when using granular components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Looks like a recurring interest component, but likely already included in broader interest costs; including it risks double counting.
Finance-cost wording, but appears empty in preview and is less concrete than the populated granular rows.
Correct conceptually but empty and less useful than the populated main row 'Interest costs'.
Not interest expense.
Not interest expense.
Equity/NCI concept, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components rather than the subtotal 'Financial costs net of income'. Excluded FX and fair-value items as non-core/valuation-driven. Excluded lease-interest supplemental row to avoid possible double counting with 'Interest costs'.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which is preferred by rule.
Equity label exists but is less preferred because it may include NCI.
Same concept as total equity; less preferred than parent-attributable equity.
Only a component of equity, not total book equity.
Shareholder count, not equity value.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.
